data.name: Room Service
data.detailed_description:
ROOM SERVICE

Check into The Grand Desire Hotel, where the staff takes hospitality to a whole new level.

You've booked the Premium Experience package, and every member of the hotel staff is eager to make your stay... unforgettable.

MEET THE STAFF:

Victoria - The sophisticated hotel manager with a commanding presence and secrets behind her professional smile.

Suki - The shy Japanese room service attendant whose innocent demeanor hides a curious nature.

Natasha - The flirtatious Russian housekeeper who believes in thorough... deep cleaning.

Amber - The serene spa therapist whose healing hands offer more than just massage.

Roxie - The confident bartender who mixes drinks by day and makes memories by night.

FEATURES:

- 5 unique character routes

- Multiple endings per character

- Stunning anime visual novel artwork

- Suggestive themes and adult content

- Approximately 2-3 hours of gameplay per route

Will you sample every service the hotel has to offer, or find yourself checking in permanently with your favorite staff member?

The choice is yours. Room service is just a call away.

data.short_description: Check into a luxury hotel where 5 stunning staff members offer very personal service. Romance the manager, maid, housekeeper, spa therapist, or bartender in this adult visual novel.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later (x64)
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOs 10.10 or later
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04.7 or later
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
